name: Georgette Kerr
title: Owner & Founder
credentials: Certified Postpartum Doula · Gentle Sleep Coach · 25+ Years
bio: Georgette became a certified postpartum doula over 25 years ago and founded After the Stork out of a genuine desire to support new families. She built the business organically — moms sharing her phone number with friends — and grew it into a LOVE Award-winning service. She has four grown children and seven grandchildren of her own. She attended the intensive three-month Gentle Sleep Coach training program and makes herself available to all After the Stork families to guide infant sleep at no additional charge.

name: Ashley Morrison
title: General Manager
credentials: Certified Postpartum Doula · Elementary Education · Child Development
bio: Ashley is Georgette's oldest daughter. She spent her early college years as a full-time nanny, became a certified elementary school teacher with extensive child development training, and received her postpartum doula training twenty years ago. Now a mother of four boys ages nine to eighteen, Ashley brings a grounded, practical understanding of family life to her role managing After the Stork's operations.

name: Allison Hart, MS RD IBCLC
title: Lactation Consultant
credentials: International Board Certified Lactation Consultant · Registered Dietitian · West Chester University
bio: Allison is Georgette's youngest daughter and holds a master's degree in dietetics from West Chester University. As a Registered Dietitian she had the rewarding experience of counseling clients toward their health goals. Allison went on to earn her IBCLC credential — the highest level of breastfeeding training available. She lives by the team's mantra Georgette has instilled in the whole After the Stork team: your goals are our goals. Allison has two young children of her own who make her home a place of lots of girly giggles.

name: Doula Team Member
title: Postpartum Doula
bio: A member of the After the Stork care team, bringing warmth, expertise, and dedication to every family we serve.
